item.title: File-over-app Digital Philosophy
item.description: Abstract : I move beyond digital apps when it comes notes taking and journaling, why? Because controlling raw resources file is important. File over app is a philosophy where you get to control all file with formats that easy to read over long period of time, no matter how developed technology is. My aim is to create a digital artifact on my works.

item.title: The Importance of Theory of Knowledge
item.description:
Abstract : I express the importance of theory of knowledge (epistemology) as acquisition and justification of belief systems. This essay emphasizes the significance of epistemology as a foundational tool for understanding the limitations of knowledge, and how to navigate the abundance of information and knowledge in the modern world. Epistemological inquiry is path of humility, yet path to the truth.

→ Download PDF version of this essay.

item.title: Formations of the Secular: Christianity, Islam, Modernity
Orientalism: Western Conceptions of the Orient
The Anatomy of Knowledge & the Ontological Necessity of First Principle
The Impossible State: Islam, Politics, and Modernity’s Moral Predicament
The Rise and Triumph of the Modern Self: Cultural Amnesia, Expressive Individualism, and the Road to Sexual Revolution
about
item.description: I am Muhammad Gaffar, currently pursuing a PhD in theoretical physics with a focus on many-body physics. This blog is a collection of notes, essays, and mini libraries. Notes are a study notes, that I hope it will be helpful as study reference. Essays will cover my interests subject (physics, philosophy of science, history, secularism, and Islam). The aim of essay is to review a subject and sharing my thoughts. Mini libraries are simply a books recommendation, and collection of references under particular subject, so I (and visitor) can benefit by navigating through it.
